title: Replace monolithic docs workflow with staged deployment system
body:
- [x] Remove old `.github/workflows/builds-docs.yml`
- [x] Create merged `docs-deploy.yml`, `docs-cleanup-staging-pr.yml`, `docs-go-live.yml`
- [x] Fix `docs/docfx.json` — `net9.0` → `net10.0`
- [x] Add `docs-deploy-fork-pr.yml` — secure fork PR staging via `workflow_run`
- [x] Security hardening — least-privilege permissions, env vars, PR number validation
- [x] Review feedback: PR_NUMBER validation, dedup comment, cleanup gh-pages guard, YAML parse fix
- [x] Build info via `AssemblyMetadata` MSBuild attribute + `MainLayout.razor` runtime read
- [x] Fix: restore missing `@media (min-width: 641px) {` in `MainLayout.razor.css`

<!-- START COPILOT CODING AGENT TIPS -->
---
